ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Aadhaar numbers are never stored by us
do not submit UPSI through unencrypted email

must_detect.matched_text:
Purpose: onboarding, KYC support, broker back-office integration, and listed-company compliance; lawful basis includes consent and legitimate uses under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (India).
Product names mentioned herein (LotusPay KYC Suite, Banyan Vault, MangoDesk) are internal modules and do not imply collection of every field shown in demo screens.
Identifiers on forms are minimised; we do not require Aadhaar for account creation; placeholder entries such as PAN: ZZZZZ9999Z, GSTIN: 00AAAAA0000A0Z0, Aadhaar: 0000-0000-0000 are invalid examples only
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_detect.matched_text:
Banyan Ledger Services Private Limited (controller) and Hibiscus Cloud Solutions LLP (processor) issue this India Privacy Notice & Data Processing Addendum for enterprise clients.
Purpose: onboarding, KYC support, broker back-office integration, and listed-company compliance; lawful basis includes consent and legitimate uses under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (India).
Product names mentioned herein (LotusPay KYC Suite, Banyan Vault, MangoDesk) are internal modules and do not imply collection of every field shown in demo screens.
Identifiers on forms are minimised; we do not require Aadhaar for account creation; placeholder entries such as PAN: ZZZZZ9999Z, GSTIN: 00AAAAA0000A0Z0, Aadhaar: 0000-0000-0000 are invalid examples only.
Data Subject Access Requests may be submitted via dsar@banyanledger.example; we authenticate using ticket IDs and will not ask for OTPs by telephone.
For listed-client workflows, Banyan Ledger operates under the Insider Trading Policy of Marigold Renewables Limited (Indica Stock Exchange) and the national securities regulator’s PIT framework.
Unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) includes draft financials and board-approved but unannounced actions; trading windows are closed accordingly, and already-announced
